_provenance: Classical Vedic (Parashari / Brihat Jataka) framework for planetary natures, significations, natural friendships and dignities. Encoded from the well-documented tradition and cross-checked against src/services/astro-engine.js (EXALT / DEBIL / OWN / friendship tables) which computes the app's live charts. NOTE: the source PDFs (Brihat Jataka, Surya Siddhanta) were not present in docs/sources/ at build time, so citations are to the framework, not to page/section — add the sources to cross-reference.
_shape: id -> { name, nature, governs[], friends[], enemies[], neutral[], strong:{exalted, own[]}, weak:{debilitated} }

sun.name: Sun
sun.nature: hot, dry, masculine; the soul, ego, vitality and will

moon.name: Moon
moon.nature: cool, moist, feminine; the mind, emotions, receptivity and the mother

mars.name: Mars
mars.nature: hot, dry, masculine; energy, drive, courage and conflict

mercury.name: Mercury
mercury.nature: neutral, adaptable; intellect, speech, logic and commerce

jupiter.name: Jupiter
jupiter.nature: warm, benefic, expansive; wisdom, ethics, growth and fortune

venus.name: Venus
venus.nature: cool, moist, benefic; love, beauty, pleasure and relationship

saturn.name: Saturn
saturn.nature: cold, dry, malefic; discipline, delay, endurance and karma

rahu.name: Rahu
rahu.nature: shadow node; ambition, obsession, the unconventional and the foreign

ketu.name: Ketu
ketu.nature: shadow node; detachment, insight, spirituality and the past
